## Feature Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you are proposing.

## Motivation / Use Case

Explain the problem this feature would solve or the use case it would enable.

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision the feature working. Include API examples if applicable.

```typescript
// Example of how the feature might be used
```

## Alternatives Considered

A description of any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references related to this feature request.
